data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SLA breach detection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Trigger detection when SLA breached'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to SLA breach detection. The linked use case mentions the need for SLA definitions but lacks concrete evidence that these have been established or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of SLA breach detection mechanisms being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add SLA breach detection validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify SLA breach detection.
